title: Lesson 11
paragraph: The famous theater started a classical music program for young listeners. Some seats were absent from the old hall map, and one child felt alone because his friend was asleep. The first song seemed boring, but the second song was cool and different. The guide was certain that visitors from the eastern side of town would enjoy the warm sound.

words.example: Three students were absent from class today.
She felt alone in the new city at first.
The baby is asleep in the next room.
The long speech was boring for many students.
I am certain that I locked the door.

words.meaning: connected with traditional serious music or old styles
words.japaneseMeaning: クラシックの、古典的な
words.example: My sister listens to classical music while studying.

words.meaning: slightly cold or fashionable and attractive
words.example: The evening air felt cool after the rain.

words.meaning: not the same as another person or thing
words.example: This answer is different from mine.
The eastern entrance is closer to the station.
Kyoto is famous for old temples.
